expected.custom_script:
return is_array($result)
	&& ($result['version'] ?? null)==='2'
	&& !empty($result['challenge_id'])
	&& !empty($result['nonce'])
	&& ($result['algorithm'] ?? null)==='SHA-256'
	&& isset($result['difficulty_bits'], $result['issued_at'], $result['expires_at'], $result['signature'])
	&& ($result['scope'] ?? null)==='unit_test_login'
	&& ($result['expires_at'] ?? 0) > ($result['issued_at'] ?? 0);
